今年聖誕冇跳跳虎

【on.cc東網專訊】 男電腦技術員涉在任職的小學內，先後在校內電腦枱下安裝攝錄鏡頭及於4名女教師的手提電腦安裝黑客程式，遙控電腦的攝錄鏡頭，分別偷拍使用者胯下位置及偷窺女教師的日常舉動，甚至在離職後涉嫌遙距干擾學校電腦。警方檢驗其電腦，發現330多萬張涉案照片，其中150多萬張為該校副校長的大頭照。他昨承認不誠實取用電腦等共8罪。案件今押後至下月10日判刑，以待被告的心理報告，法官指判囚無可避免，拒絕被告保釋申請。

36歲被告盧景順承認不誠實取用電腦、刑事毁壞及有犯罪意圖而取用電腦共8罪。案情指，被告於2006年1月起入職跑馬地一小學的資訊科技支援員，是唯一有權管理學校電腦伺服器管理帳號的職員。2014年1月29日，有老師發現學校電腦有不尋常檔案，打開後驚覺電腦螢幕出現自己褲襠位置的影像，發現枱下的攝錄鏡頭，通知學校。翌日警方拘捕被告，被告於警誡下承認安裝有關鏡頭。

被告又於錄影會面中表示，自己從未與女性談戀愛，對女性一直存在幻想，故於14年1月安裝鏡頭偷拍，指可用其他電腦連接涉事電腦。期間他更主動承認為女教師修理電腦時，安裝黑客程式，遙距控制電腦的攝錄鏡頭，偷窺女教師。

被告其後於同年1月31日離職，但同年2月14日有教師發現電腦在沒有人使用情況下，螢幕鼠標自動運作，遂報警處理，揭發被告以遙距程式有所行動。

警方檢驗被告的個人電腦及校內使用的電腦，發現330多萬張涉案照片，涉及不同教師，其中150多萬張為女副校長的大頭照。

辯方陳詞指，被告事後已接受心理療程，希望可以保釋與母親「做冬」，惟法官表示，判囚無可避免，拒絕被告保釋申請。

【now.com體育】阿仙奴球迷嘲笑同市死敵熱刺在歐聯分組賽主場作賽竟然出現大量空凳。

熱刺周三在歐聯最後1場分組賽，繼續以溫布萊球場為主場，結果以3:1大勝莫斯科中央陸軍，可惜也許是球迷知道球隊已經晉級無望，因此看台上出現大量空凳。

同市死敵阿仙奴的球迷紛紛嘲諷熱刺球迷們開波不見人，Gary Driscoll在Twitter寫道：「熱刺迷別再說酋長球場有空凳！看看溫布萊！」West Upper Plastic也寫道：「看來很多熱刺球迷入場扮凳。」

根據官方入場人數記錄，今仗入場人數有62034人，相比今季首場歐聯分組賽主場對摩納哥時的85011人，足足少了2萬多人，認真誇張！上次的入場人數更打破英國球隊在歐聯的主場入場人數紀錄，當然也打破熱刺的主場入座紀錄。

皇家馬德里周三在歐聯分組賽主場與多蒙特打成2:2，獲得F組第2名資格晉級16強，教練施丹（Zinedine Zidane）坦言最不想抽到的對手，是前東家祖雲達斯，「我很想避開祖雲達斯，但無能為力，只能靜待抽籤的結果。我有兩個原因不想對祖雲達斯，首先我深愛這支球隊，其次是他們的實力非常強勁。」施丹說。

至於祖記最危險的人物是誰？施丹說：「保羅戴巴拿和希古恩是偉大的射手，但我不想拿他們跟我的球員比較。」

THE BOSS ON OZIL AND ALEXIS’ CONTRACTS

Arsène Wenger faced the media on Thursday and was asked at length about the long-term futures of both Mesut Ozil and Alexis.
Both players have been in sensational form this season, and the boss was quizzed about his plans to try to tie them to new contracts.

This is what he had to say:
on Ozil and Alexis’ contributions this season…
They have been hugely important. You can talk a lot in the press conference but the most important thing is what the players do on the pitch. The commitment of Alexis and Ozil is absolutely totally for the team’s benefit and I’m very pleased with that. We are professional football people and people forget many times that the first quality of a professional guy is to give absolutely 100 per cent as long as he is somewhere, and not to project yourself on two years. It’s here and now, that’s what it means to be professional - here and now I’m fully committed to the cause and that’s what it’s about.

on why Ozil and Alexis have been so prolific…
I would say that our chances created are cleaner and clearer, and that’s why our finishing is better. We create good quality chances because we have a good team dynamic, and that’s what we want to create at home as well. I feel away from home we play with freedom because we have a good level of confidence and at home we have to let the handbrake go as well and play with full flow. Then we will score more goals.

on Ozil and Alexis’ long-term future…
It depends what you call the long term. Eighteen months [left on their contracts] is quite long in football.

on what assurances he can give about their contracts…
They have 18 months left on their contracts and they are completely committed to doing well as long as they are here. Beyond that, we’ll try to extend their contracts but I cannot make that the subject in every press conference because it’s a normal part of every renewal when you renegotiate. The less you talk about it, the better it is.

on Alexis being offered £400,000 per week to play in China…
I believe it, yes, why not? But why should you go to China when you’re playing in England today?

on whether discussing contracts is the worst part of being a manager…
No. It has always been a part of my job and it has always been difficult. But the problem is when the players have a big name, it’s a repetition of always the same things because you are always asked exactly the same things. But that doesn’t improve the speed of the negotiations. It doesn’t improve the speed of decision making. You have to respect the process in every single negotiation. Sometimes it goes very quick, sometimes it’s slow. The only handicap when it’s slow is that you get that served in every press conference.

on whether he is worried the uncertainty affects the dressing room…
No, because we are all professionals. Eighteen months is a long time in the game and I don’t believe that that is any problem.
